message:
fix(a11y): improve scroll lock and add modal focus trap

use-body-scroll-lock:
- Use reference counting to handle multiple concurrent locks
- Prevents conflicts when multiple modals try to lock/unlock
- Properly restores original styles only when all locks released
- Fixes edge case where rapid open/close could leave body locked

keyboard-shortcuts-modal:
- Add focus trap to keep keyboard focus inside modal
- Tab cycles through focusable elements (first -> last -> first)
- Shift+Tab cycles in reverse (last -> first -> last)
- Improves keyboard accessibility per WCAG 2.1 AA guidelines

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
